summary: Pack 3 - Portal Polish & Conversion Optimization: Frontend testing complete. All new Pack 3 components verified: EmptyStateCard with secondary CTA support, PromoArtCards on dashboard/referrals/maintenance/service-requests pages, ServiceRequestsPage/ServiceRequestDetailPage working, CustomerPortalLayout has Service Requests nav, ReferralPointsBanner with copy code and stronger messaging, ReferralsPage with WhatsApp share, PointsPage with use case cards. Minor issue: MaintenanceDashboardPage API endpoint /api/maintenance/my-requests returns 404.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - MaintenanceDashboardPage expects this customer endpoint but it doesn't exist. Only admin endpoint /api/admin/maintenance-requests exists.

integration_issues.issue: API /api/maintenance/my-requests returns 404. Page shows empty state correctly but logs console error.

features: Secondary CTA support via secondaryCtaLabel/secondaryCtaHref props
Refer Friends and Use My Points CTAs
Continue Payment CTA for pending requests
3 use case cards (Creative Services, Products & Orders, Refer More)

PointsUsageHint.note: Component created but not yet integrated into checkout flows

features: Empty state with secondary CTA (View Quotes)
Empty state with secondary CTA (Browse Products)

The /api/maintenance/my-requests endpoint is missing - MaintenanceDashboardPage shows empty state but logs 404 error. Test customer testcustomer@konekt.com/password created for testing purposes.
